query:
-- 2. digestSafe gate coverage
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_gates,
  SUM(digestSafe) as digest_safe_count,
  SUM(primaryAcceptable) as primary_acceptable,
  SUM(backupAcceptable) as backup_acceptable
FROM projectValidationGates;

-- 2. digestSafe gate coverage
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_gates,
  SUM(digestSafe) as digest_safe_count,
  SUM(primaryAcceptable) as primary_acceptable,
  SUM(backupAcceptable) as backup_acceptable
FROM projectValidationGates;
